default_character_set.description: The default character set for the RDS engine version.

engine_description.description: A description of the RDS engine.

exportable_log_types.description: The types of logs that can be exported from the RDS engine.

id.description: The identifier for the RDS engine version data source.

parameter_group_family.description: The family of parameter groups that this RDS engine version belongs to.

status.description: The current status of the RDS engine version.

supported_character_sets.description: Character sets supported by this RDS engine version.

supported_feature_names.description: Feature names supported by this RDS engine version.

supported_modes.description: Modes supported by this RDS engine version.

supported_timezones.description: Timezones supported by this RDS engine version.

supports_global_databases.description: Indicates if the RDS engine version supports global databases.

supports_limitless_database.description: Indicates if the RDS engine version supports limitless databases.

supports_log_exports_to_cloudwatch.description: Indicates if the RDS engine version supports exporting logs to CloudWatch.

supports_parallel_query.description: Indicates if the RDS engine version supports parallel query.

supports_read_replica.description: Indicates if the RDS engine version supports read replicas.

valid_major_targets.description: Valid major version targets for upgrade.

valid_minor_targets.description: Valid minor version targets for upgrade.

valid_upgrade_targets.description: Valid targets for upgrading to this RDS engine version.

version.description: The version number of the RDS engine.

version_actual.description: The actual version of the RDS engine being used.
